message:
test(widgets): add 18 unit tests for undo_support.rs (bd-2cofq)

Cover UndoWidgetId (Display, Default uniqueness, Hash/Eq),
TextEditOperation (Replace/SetValue descriptions, size_bytes for all
variants), WidgetTextEditCmd (no-callback execute/undo, redo, Debug,
size_bytes), TreeOperation::ToggleBatch, ListOperation::MultiSelect,
TableOperation (Filter, SelectRow), SelectionOperation::Changed.
27 total tests (9 existing + 18 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
